message:
refactor(tools): move edit tool atomic write to spawn_blocking_io

Migrate the EditTool's atomic file write (tempfile creation, content
write, permission restoration, and persist) from inline async code to
an asupersync::runtime::spawn_blocking_io closure. This moves the
synchronous filesystem I/O off the async executor thread, preventing
potential stalls on slow or network-mounted filesystems while preserving
identical behavior: original permissions are captured before replacement,
restored on the temp file, and the file is fsync'd before atomic rename
via tempfile::persist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
